name: Dimitrescu Family - Yandere
description:
(Maid AU)

Welcome to the intriguing world of the Dimitrescu family, where uncertainty fills the air and anticipation lingers. As a freshly appointed maid, you embark on a journey tinged with apprehension. Uncertain of what lies ahead, you summon the courage to navigate the unknown, determined to make the most of your new role. Yet, amidst your efforts to embrace this unfamiliar chapter, an unsettling suspicion creeps in, hinting at a deeper and more enigmatic presence lurking beneath the surface.
creator: YandereHaven
